title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Duel of Meloch**
*2026*
Scythe vs Expeditions: Clash head-to-head on a tight map in a race to victory.
![Duel of Meloch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_86ef6bfe.png)

2. **Schadenfreude**
*2020*
Second highest wins the trick, but avoid collecting duplicate valued cards to score.
![Schadenfreude](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_2140133c.jpg)

3. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_41341902.jpg)

4. **Chivalry**
*2026*
Travel the Lands of Camelot with your retinue for influence and glory.
![Chivalry](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_8d4404ba.jpg)

5. **Rolling Deep**
*2027*
Journey to the Center of the Earth in this Balatro-inspired roguelike dice game.
![Rolling Deep](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_857b4416.jpg)

6. **The Quest for El Dorado**
*2017*
Race through a dense South American jungle in pursuit of the legendary city of gold.
![The Quest for El Dorado](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_85cf3acf.jpg)

7. **Shards of Creation**
*2026*
Harness the primal forces of Brandon Sanderson's Cosmere.
![Shards of Creation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_d522b5bb.jpg)

8. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_0d56a705.jpg)

9. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_8b3ffb08.jpg)

10. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_1c39a3a4.jpg)

11. **The Glorious Guilds of Buttonville**
*2025*
Assemble villagers to help recover the glory of Buttonville.
![The Glorious Guilds of Buttonville](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_0fbf8851.jpg)

12. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_1d26b796.jpg)

13. **Moytura**
*2026*
Invoke legendary deities and battle for control of ancient Ireland.
![Moytura](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_ad8d5b11.png)

14. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_c89cb2f5.png)

15. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_cc0799a0.jpg)

16. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_1c8537ca.png)

17. **Entropy**
*2026*
Create stars, form planets, and guide life from microbes to animals.
![Entropy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_3b24b03e.jpg)

18. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_cbc1ed6a.jpg)

19. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_2bcb37f1.jpg)

20. **Troyes**
*2010*
Defend the city and rise to power by influencing the clergy, nobility and peasants.
![Troyes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_11ca0400.jpg)

21. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_14bf15c3.jpg)

22. **Joraku**
*2015*
March samurai towards Kyoto and conquer regions of Japan by using trick-taking.
![Joraku](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_4352d4e8.jpg)

23. **Revenant**
*2026*
Evacuate a besieged starfleet, navigating external threats and internal allegiances.
![Revenant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_593e8800.jpg)

24. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_ab330226.jpg)

25. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_34a2930b.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*17 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_e4623d8b.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*25 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_1bab0fa4.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*53 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_8d9b87db.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*20 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_1ce2f9a1.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*89 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_67dcf929.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*103 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_0e6839a3.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*13 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_7b52be17.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*116 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_da722c42.jpg)

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*35 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_e3001f57.jpg)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*42 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_ff99fce8.jpg)

11. **Cascadia**
*58 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_c7b0de76.jpg)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*32 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_80150be2.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*4 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_ac5c21d0.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*25 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_0794fa4a.png)

15. **The Gang**
*11 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_5f9d39ae.jpg)

16. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*65 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_0d071d6c.jpg)

17. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*18 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_31288f87.jpg)

18. **Sky Team**
*32 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_77b7e1c3.jpg)

19. **Magical Athlete**
*4 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_8971402b.png)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*11 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_7219fe9d.jpg)

21. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*5 months on the list*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_9ded1ae8.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*275 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_70c65302.jpg)

23. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*1 months on the list*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_a4c4db41.jpg)

24. **Toy Battle**
*3 months on the list*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_110575c2.jpg)

25. **SCOUT**
*42 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-29/toplist/bgg_23a0c7b6.png)
